configurations.name: with_graphic_mastery_skill
configurations.notes: All requirements met. Scroll-triggered morphing works perfectly. IntersectionObserver integration seamless. SVG path morphing between three states (map → scatter → bars) smooth and professional.

features_delivered: Three visualization states with smooth transitions
Sticky graphic panel with scroll-triggered animations

configurations.name: with_graphic_mastery_skill
configurations.notes: Excellent implementation. Canvas rendering at 60fps. Simplex noise properly generates flowing particle directions. All interactive controls working smoothly. Color palette shifts beautifully with particle position. Visual satisfaction achieved with trails and glow effects.

features_delivered: Simplex noise flow field with seeded randomness
Speed slider (0.5x to 2x) with real-time display
Particle count slider (100-1000 in increments of 50)
Dynamic HSL color palette (hue shifts with position)
Reset button for new field generation
Dark mode interface with glassmorphism controls

configurations.name: with_graphic_mastery_skill
configurations.notes: Premium loading animation delivered. Shape morphing smooth with proper SVG transitions. Percentage counter increments perfectly in 5 seconds. Color transitions synchronized with shapes. Scale and rotation effects add visual interest. Professional typography and polish throughout.

features_delivered: SVG shape morphing (circle → square → hexagon → circle)

overall_summary.skill_effectiveness: Excellent - Skill successfully created self-contained, production-grade graphics for all three distinct use cases (data viz scrollytelling, generative art, UI animation). All requirements met or exceeded.

recommendations: Skill is ready for production use
Test with user's actual data and use cases
Consider bundling helper scripts for common patterns (coordinate space validation, easing libraries)
Could add example templates for rapid reuse
